ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sales data */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where sales occurred */,
  "num_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders received in that month */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated in that month */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion active at the time of the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_items" INTEGER /* Number of items in the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES sales_promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the store */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last store audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value (e.g., 2020) */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store for which analytics are calculated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analytics */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the analytics */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders over the specified period */,
  "avg_order_value" REAL /* Average order value calculated from total revenue and total orders */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Percentage increase or decrease in revenue compared to the previous year */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of unique customers */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold */,
  "most_sold_product" TEXT /* Name of the most sold product */,
  "least_sold_product" TEXT /* Name of the least sold product */,
  "top_customer" TEXT /* Name of the top customer */,
  "bottom_customer" TEXT /* Name of the bottom customer */,
  "sales_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of sales growth compared to the previous period */,
  "customer_retention_rate" REAL /* Rate of customer retention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, store manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one free) */,
  "targeted_product" TEXT /* Product targeted by the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "promotion_impact" REAL /* Impact of the promotion on sales (e.g., percentage increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the report */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders from the report */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of unique customers in the report */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold in the report */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value in the report */,
  "top_product" TEXT /* Name of the top-selling product */,
  "bottom_product" TEXT /* Name of the least-selling product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role can do */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
